name: isMalicious - Threat Intelligence API
description:
Official isMalicious threat intelligence API for domain, IP, and URL reputation checking.

**Base URL:** `https://api.ismalicious.com`

**Documentation:** [ismalicious.com/api-docs](https://ismalicious.com/api-docs)

---

## Authentication

Get your API keys from [ismalicious.com/app/account](https://ismalicious.com/app/account)

**Header:** `X-API-KEY`
**Value:** Base64 encode `apiKey:apiSecret`

---

## Rate Limits

| Plan | Requests/min | Requests/day |
|------|--------------|-------------|
| FREE | 10 | 100 |
| BASIC | 60 | 5,000 |
| PRO | 300 | 50,000 |
| Custom | Contact sales | Contact sales |
